lines.en: Mom, I am hungry. Can we order some food?
lines.zh: 妈妈，我饿了。我们可以点些外卖吗？

lines.en: OK. What do you want to eat?
Fried chicken is not very healthy. How about noodles?
lines.zh: 炸鸡不太健康。面条怎么样？

lines.en: I will order a vegetable dish and some rice.
lines.zh: 我要点一个蔬菜和米饭。

lines.en: About thirty minutes, the app says.
lines.zh: 手机上显示大约三十分钟。

lines.en: That is fast. I will set the table.
Good boy. Wash your hands first!
